base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of morton_ludwig_roy — a character (boss) from 1990 super mario world. Morton + Ludwig + Roy Koopalings (World 2/4/5 castles). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
